text: All models are wrong, but some are useful.
author: George Box

text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
author: Alan Kay

text: In theory, there is no difference between theory and practice. In practice, there is.
author: Jan L. A. van de Snepscheut

text: Science is built up with data, as a house is with stones. But a collection of data is no more a science than a heap of stones is a house.
author: J.H. Poincaré

text: In science, if you know what you are doing, you should not be doing it. In engineering, if you do not know what you are doing, you should not be doing it.
author: Richard Hamming
